scenes.prompt:
Photorealistic premium Austrian/DACH residential architecture photography for M&P Holzbau landing page.
Subject is a custom timber carport by an Austrian Zimmermeisterbetrieb, not a metal carport, not a pergola, not a garage. Realistic Lower Austria / Burgenland / Vienna surroundings, plausible family homes and driveways.
Show believable timber construction: straight posts, correct roof depth, clean rafters, credible roof edge, clean Auflager/Nuten/joinery feeling, structurally plausible spans and foundations. No crude metal angle brackets as hero detail. No impossible beams, warped posts, floating roofs, fantasy architecture, US suburbia, Mediterranean villa, showroom CGI, text, signage, watermark.
IMPORTANT: empty carport / empty parking bay. No cars, no vans, no vehicles, no bicycles parked in the bay, no vehicle crossing the driveway, no car perpendicular or sideways to the entrance. The empty paved parking bay must make the carport architecture and driveway flow readable. True horizontal 16:9 composition, 2K, natural light, polished but believable.
Scene: modern Austrian architect villa with glass, pale render and timber accents. A high-end light natural oak/larch timber flat-roof carport is architecturally integrated into the house. One weather-side wall uses the same facade language as the house: matching pale facade panels/render rhythm and vertical structure, while the timber carport remains clearly visible. Premium but realistic, calm wide angle, empty bay.
